_comment: This deploys ONLY the frontend (concord-text). The sync server (concord-sync-server) must be deployed separately on a platform that supports persistent WebSocket connections (e.g. Railway, Render, Fly.io). Vercel serverless functions do not support long-lived WebSocket connections.
buildCommand: pnpm --filter concord-core run build && pnpm --filter concord-text run build
